name: Rose Paladin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>薔薇の聖騎士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ローズ・パラディン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Plant monster from your hand or Deck in Defense Position. You can send this card from your hand to the GY; add 1 Level 7 or higher Plant monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Rose Paladin" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Plant monster from your hand or Deck in Defense Position. You can send this card from your hand to the GY; add 1 Level 7 or higher Plant monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Rose Paladin" once per turn.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Plant monster from your hand or Deck in Defense Position. You can send this card from your hand to the GY; add 1 Level 7 or higher Plant monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Rose Paladin" once per turn.

sets.set: Premium Gold: Return of the Bling

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
